title: Linguistic Relativity
description: Whorf-Sapir hypothesis: does your language shape your thought?
summary_pt_br: Hipótese de Whorf-Sapir: a língua molda o pensamento? Versão forte desacreditada; versão fraca tem evidência.

scenes.subtitle_en: Whorf-Sapir hypothesis: does your language shape your thought?
scenes.subtitle_pt: Hipótese de Whorf-Sapir: a língua molda o pensamento? Versão forte desacreditada; versão fraca tem evidência.

scenes.text_en: Whorf-Sapir hypothesis: does your language shape your thought? Focus: linguistic relativity. Languages with more color terms help speakers distinguish shades faster.
scenes.text_pt: Hipótese de Whorf-Sapir: a língua molda o pensamento? Versão forte desacreditada; versão fraca tem evidência. Foco: linguistic relativity. Línguas com mais cores distinguem tons mais rápido.

scenes.title: Linguistic Relativity
scenes.body_en: STRONG WHORF: language determines thought (largely discredited). WEAK WHORF: language influences habitual attention. Evidence: color perception, spatial orientation, grammatical gender affect memory.
scenes.body_pt: Hipótese de Whorf-Sapir: a língua molda o pensamento? Versão forte desacreditada; versão fraca tem evidência.

examples.en: Languages with more color terms help speakers distinguish shades faster.
examples.pt: Línguas com mais cores distinguem tons mais rápido.

examples.en: Whether a noun is masculine or feminine affects how speakers describe it.
examples.pt: Gênero gramatical afeta como descrevemos objetos.

examples.en: The weak Whorfian view is widely accepted today.
examples.pt: A versão fraca é amplamente aceita hoje.

exercise.hint_pt_br: Línguas com mais cores distinguem tons mais rápido.

scenes.title: Linguistic Relativity — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre linguistic relativity. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Language determines what you can think.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Language is a lens, not a cage.

scenes.title: The psycholinguistics talk
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize strong vs weak Whorfianism. Use at least three linguistic terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the psycholinguistics conference, Kumar listened to a talk that opened with one provocative question.

paragraphs.speaker: Speaker
paragraphs.en: Does the language you speak shape what you can actually think — or only what you find easy to notice?

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Strong Whorfianism — the idea that language determines thought — has been largely discredited for decades now.

paragraphs.speaker: Speaker
paragraphs.en: But the weak version survives. Languages with more color terms help speakers distinguish subtle shades faster.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Grammatical gender biases descriptions. Speakers describe 'bridge' differently depending on whether it's feminine or masculine.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Linguistic relativity, Kumar believed, is a quiet reminder that every language you learn redraws the edges of your world.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Linguistic Relativity". Whorf-Sapir hypothesis: does your language shape your thought? Languages with more color terms help speakers distinguish shades faster. Whether a noun is masculine or feminine affects how speakers describe it. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Linguistic Relativity". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
